schema.description: Clinical intake form for a physiotherapy episode. Field structure transcribed from the Fisiozero physiotherapy episode form (op=av) confirmed by two independent browser extractions (2026-05-25 and 2026-06-01). This form is shared by all physio therapy types — RPG, massagem terapêutica, pilates terapêutico all use this identical form. Therapy type is appointment metadata (tipo_evento_dinamico), not a form selector. 16 fields in document order. ai_extractable reflects João Pedro's signed-off Group A/B split (docs/ai-ingestion/ai-extractable-audit.md §4.2): narrative free-text is true; safety-critical/coded/structured/private fields stay false.

x-placeholder.pt: Associar códigos CID a este episódio...
x-placeholder.en: Associate ICD codes to this episode...

main_complaints.x-note: Label changes to 'Queixas Atuais' on continuation evaluations (subav).

x-hint.pt: Clique no bodychart e seleccione o marcador pretendido
x-hint.en: Click the body chart and select the desired marker

x-label.pt: Notas Pessoais sobre o Paciente neste Episódio / Consulta

private_notes.x-note: Este campo não é partilhado com nenhum outro utilizador da sua conta.

x-hint.pt: Deverá configurar o seu Consentimento no Menu Definições Gerais — Consentimento Informado nos Relatórios
x-hint.en: Configure your consent template in General Settings — Informed Consent in Reports

_meta.source: Fisiozero production — confirmed by two independent browser extractions: Max (2026-05-25) and Claude browser agent (2026-06-01). URL: app.fisiozero.pt op=av.
_meta.version_note: v4 — applies João Pedro's signed-off ai_extractable Group A split (docs/ai-ingestion/ai-extractable-audit.md §4.2). Group A narrative fields flipped to true: main_complaints, background, treatment_goals, treatment_plan, observations. Group B (red_flags, diagnosis, medication, cid_codes) and always-false fields (episode_date, weight_kg, height_cm, linked_appointment, bodychart, private_notes, consent_in_report) stay false. No field added or removed and no placement change vs v3 (v3 already conforms to the §2 leaf-flag convention) — flag values only. Bumped (not edited in place) because v3 may already be referenced by a clinical_record and is immutable. Wrappers (rpg, massagem-terapeutica, pilates-terapeutico) reference this form by key via x-form-ref and inherit these flags.
_meta.fisiozero_note: This form is shared by ALL physio therapy types. RPG, massagem terapêutica (Tratamento terapeutico), and pilates terapêutico use this identical form. Therapy type is set as appointment metadata (tipo_evento_dinamico), not as a form selector.
